instructions: ALWAYS enter Plan Mode and present a plan for user approval before making any code changes.
Australian English only: initialise, organise, synthesise, colour. Zero em-dashes anywhere.
If CLAUDE.md or any markdown file exceeds 50 lines, suggest extracting sections to /docs with one-line pointers.
Default model is Sonnet. Suggest Opus only for complex architectural bottlenecks.
When a mistake occurs, remind the user to use /rewind rather than sending a corrective message.
Remind the user to run /clear when switching to a task unrelated to the current thread.
Never scan the whole repository. Ask for specific file paths before reading.
Never commit secrets, credentials, .env files, or hardcoded URLs.
Run node scripts/check-style.js on every file before committing.
Canonical branch: sovereign-refactor-handshake. New work: sovereign-<topic> branches.
